abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Sturdy Saddlebags
abilities.text: Once per turn. Before this model moves, it may remove a marker within 2". If it does, after resolving the move, it may make a Scheme marker within 1".

abilities.name: Trick Shot
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves an attack action targeting an enemy which received at least one raise, this model draws a card.

triggers.name: A' Clatter
triggers.text: Move the target up to 2". If the target has a Staggered token, move the target +2".

triggers.name: Quick Shot
triggers.text: Declare a (gun) action, even if engaged.

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or a destructible terrain piece within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Bloody Legacy
triggers.text: The target gains a Staggered token, then this model and allies within (aura)2" gain an Impact token.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Drop It!
triggers.text: Target may discard a card. If it does not, make a Scheme marker in base contact with it.

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.
